name: Scared Fearful Face
desc: Represents a sense of being cold with fear. Perfect for expressing worry, mild shock, or feeling genuinely scared of an outcome.

name: Scared Screaming Face
desc: The ultimate icon for intense fear and horror. Ideal for spooky Halloween content, jumpscares, and being completely terrified.

name: Scared Anxious Face with Sweat
desc: Conveys a mix of being scared and stressed. Often used for high-pressure situations, deadlines, or nervous fear.

name: Scared Stunned Face
desc: Captures the look of someone frozen by fear. Great for reacting to scary news or shocking, fearful revelations.

name: Scared Anguished Face
desc: A face showing deep concern and fear. Used for somber, fearful moments where someone is pained by a scary situation.

name: Scared Weary Cat
desc: A feline version of a scared face. Popular for pet-related scares or adding a playful, dramatic touch to fearful posts.

name: Scared Ghost
desc: A fun symbol for things that go bump in the night. Perfect for lighthearted 'scary' stories, Halloween, and spooky vibes.

name: Scared Grimacing Face
desc: Represents a tense, 'yikes' feeling. Used when someone is scared of an awkward confrontation or an impending disaster.

name: Scared Peeking Face
desc: Used for 'scary but I want to look' moments. Ideal for horror movie reactions and being scared but curious.

name: Scared Confounded Face
desc: Shows a face quivering with fear or frustration. Represents the physical struggle of being extremely scared or overwhelmed.

name: Scared Skull
desc: In modern slang, represents being 'scared to death' or reacting to something so intense it's metaphorically fatal.

name: Scared Spider Web
desc: A visual indicator of creepy, scary environments. Great for haunted house themes and scary outdoor content.
